series_metadata.series_description: Electronic funds transfer by district, and lists Electronic Funds Transferred from liquor agencies to State Bank system. (fna PD-26)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in the office area for for 3 months, then send to on site storage. Retain in storage for 2 years then destroy, provided audited by the Auditor of State, and the audit report is released., Paper: Recycle
